gigapan.description:
360 of the Expo hall taken from the Plush Team booth.

The Plush Team is a group of people on Etsy who make cute things.

Very cute things.  And here is an image capturing their booth on Sunday morning, right as the Maker Faire opened:
http://www.plushteam.com/
